generated_oml:
instance BuildingTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors are modeled as Building Control System (BCS) components within BIM environments, providing data for real-time synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts via continuous data exchange capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from BCS components for continuous system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformationEnabler
]

instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) as a foundational geometric model enriched with semantic data for Building Control System (BCS) components (sensors, actuators, controllers)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformationEnabler
]

instance ModelDrivenTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles transform enriched BIM models into structured representations, automatically generating deployable DT artifacts with modular extension points for custom services."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService, DecisionMakingService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through continuous data integration for insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateMonitoringInsight, InfrastructureControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure health and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operational optimization of building systems for efficiency and performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for AECO stakeholders across the building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance SystemStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interfaces enabling Facility Managers to monitor system states and control physical infrastructure"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting infrastructure health and performance for proactive maintenance planning"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven optimization of energy usage and system efficiency"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Support for data-driven decisions across design, construction, and operational phases of building lifecycle"
]

instance InfrastructureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control physical infrastructure through interactive visualization interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators are modeled as Building Control System (BCS) components within enriched BIM models, with control logic defined by Building Control Engineers. Physical infrastructure operation is executed through the Digital Twin's interactive visualization interfaces."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle spans initial device modeling in BIM environments by Building Control Engineers to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and generate deployable artifacts; real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for Facility Manager operations; and evolution through custom services developed by DT Engineers using standardized extension points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enable modular integration of custom services and analytics within the framework's modular architecture."
]
